goal: JSC-363 Codex Runtime Evidence Verifier Cockpit
intent: Remove the required-mode preflight downgrade that lets legacy positional invocation skip Local Memory or Project Brain readiness while still looking successful.

problemSignal.summary: A legacy positional preflight path can bypass the CLI-backed Local Memory lane even though Local Memory is part of the required operating surface.
problemSignal.failureMode: An agent can begin multi-step work with stale or unavailable Local Memory or Project Brain evidence while required preflight appears green.

in: Required-mode codex-preflight Local Memory and Project Brain readiness routing
Legacy positional preflight compatibility path behavior
Fixture or script regression proving the old bypass fails
Focused documentation for required versus optional memory preflight behavior
out: New memory database format or migration
Session-context traversal command work from GAP-004
Final JSC-363 goal completion or Judge/PM readiness

architecture.publicSurface: harness local-memory-preflight remains the CLI-backed required memory readiness lane used by codex-preflight required mode.
architecture.separation: The slice verifies memory readiness and bootstrap safety only; it does not claim runtime evidence ingestion, delivery truth, review state, external state, merge readiness, or tracker completion.

singleReadinessAuthority: The required-mode decision source is the local-memory-preflight CLI-backed lane. Adjacent memory-gate or shell fallback behavior must not independently classify required readiness differently.
If a shell fallback remains necessary for unavailable helper runners, required mode must still expose the same pass/fail semantics and named blocker classes as the CLI-backed lane.
requiredMode: Required preflight must invoke the same CLI-backed Local Memory lane regardless of flag-style or legacy positional invocation.
Required preflight must fail closed when Local Memory or Project Brain readiness is unavailable, stale, blocked, or cannot be classified.
Required preflight output must make optional-mode downgrade explicit when an operator intentionally chooses optional mode.

Every non-healthy required-mode classification must return a non-zero shell exit code and include a named blocker such as local_memory_unavailable, project_brain_missing, or local_memory_unclassified.
legacyInvocation: Legacy positional arguments must not silently disable Local Memory checks.
If compatibility requires preserving a legacy shape, it must translate into the current required or optional mode explicitly.
All accepted legacy invocation shapes must normalize to the same executor path as flag-style mode before Local Memory dispatch.
requiredInvocationMatrix: bash scripts/codex-preflight.sh coding-harness git,bash CODESTYLE.md required
contractRequirements.followUpOnly: harness memory status --json and harness memory validate --json remain migration targets from the audit, not part of this slice unless already present and wired by existing code.

acceptanceCriteria: harness local-memory-preflight --json remains callable and returns a machine-readable readiness packet.
bash scripts/codex-preflight.sh --stack auto --mode required delegates to the CLI-backed Local Memory lane or fails closed with a named blocker.
A table-driven regression covers every accepted legacy required-mode invocation in requiredInvocationMatrix and proves each path cannot skip Local Memory.
At least one forced-failure fixture proves required-mode legacy and flag-style invocations both return non-zero when the Local Memory lane is unavailable.
Optional mode remains available but is visibly optional and cannot be mistaken for required-mode success.
Docs or generated templates that describe preflight behavior are synchronized with the implementation.

changesApplied: Added a required invocation matrix so implementation cannot patch only one legacy alias.
Added explicit required-mode exit-code and blocker-class semantics.
Constrained memory status/validate language to follow-up-only so GAP-001 remains one slice.
Required forced-failure parity evidence for flag-style and legacy invocation paths.
Made the single readiness authority explicit to avoid split-brain local-memory-preflight versus memory-gate decisions.

reviewRequirements: Run improve-codebase-architecture, simplify, unslopify, he-code-review, and testing lenses after implementation.
Use adversarial-reviewer, agent-native-reviewer, and best-practices-researcher before marking the slice done.

expected: docs/agents/02-tooling-policy.md if preflight invocation semantics change
docs/agents/03-local-memory.md if Local Memory readiness wording changes
AGENTS.md only if required operating policy changes
ARCHITECTURE.md only if module boundaries change

circleciCredentialHandling.rule: Use this env surface for CircleCI API access when CircleCI logs or pipeline details are required; do not print values.
circleciCredentialHandling.fifoSafety: If the path is a FIFO with no active writer, classify direct CircleCI API access as credential_surface_fifo_no_writer instead of sourcing it blindly.
